title: Delhi High Court restrains Indian company from using Google’s self-driving car brand 'Waymo'
description: The Delhi High Court on Friday restrained an Indian Electric Vehicle company from using the mark “Waymo”, associated with Google’s self-driving car business [Waymo Vs P-Waymo].Justice Jyoti Singh noted that the defendants (Indian EV company) had been duly served through multiple modes, including speed post, courier and email.Despite this, none appeared on their behalf, even on the second call of the matter. In these circumstances, Justice Singh proceeded to grant an interim injunction in Google'
